turns.finish_summary: The user needs a website for creating and managing dynamic forms with the following core requirements identified: (1) Login functionality to access the system. (2) Form creation and customization by adding or removing fields. (3) Ability to edit field properties as part of customizing form structure. The term 'dynamic' primarily refers to the flexible, modifiable nature of form structures rather than conditional logic or external data sources.
